deals.deal: Free Medium Fries — National French Fry Day
deals.desc: Get a free medium order of fries with any $1+ purchase in the McDonald's app on July 10 for National French Fry Day.

deals.deal: Free Any-Size Fry — National French Fry Day
deals.desc: Score a free fry in any size with a $5+ purchase made through the Wendy's app today only.

deals.deal: 40% Off Select Bowls & Salads — Big Value Week
deals.desc: Save 40% on select bowls and salads in the Panera app or online through July 15 during Big Value Week.

deals.deal: Free Entree with $25+ Order — Big Value Week
deals.desc: Order $25 or more through the Chipotle app or website July 9–15 and receive a free entree automatically.

deals.deal: 50% Off Any Smoothie — FIFA World Cup LTO
deals.desc: Download the Jamba app and activate the FIFA World Cup Hat Trick Tango smoothie offer to get 50% off any qualifying smoothie.

deals.deal: Any Pizza Any Crust Any Toppings for $9.99
deals.desc: Order any pizza with any crust and any toppings for just $9.99 each online — Parmesan Stuffed Crust now included at no extra charge.

deals.deal: Cravings Value Menu — 10 Items at $3 or Less
deals.desc: Order from Taco Bell's Cravings Value Menu featuring 10 fan-favorite items each priced at $3 or less, available in-app or in store.

deals.deal: Free Fries with $1+ Purchase — Promo Code FRYDAY26
deals.desc: Use promo code FRYDAY26 at checkout online or in-app on July 10 to get a free order of Smashfries, Sweet Potato Waffle Fries, or Scorchin' Fries with any $1+ purchase.
Get a sandwich, side, and drink bundled together starting at $5 through the McDonald's app at participating locations.
